# Strategi

> Source: https://strategi.is/llms.txt
> Last updated: 2026-06-03

> Strategi is a strategic advisory for the AI discovery era — and the measurement layer for the category. We make the right businesses get recommended by artificial intelligence, and we build the public instruments that measure AI visibility. We are not an agency. We operate at the intersection of brand strategy, information architecture, and machine comprehension.

## About

- [Homepage](https://strategi.is): AI Presence advisory for established businesses
- [About Strategi](https://strategi.is/about): The company, the thesis, and the founders — the AI visibility authority
- [How It Works](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): The six-phase Strategi Methodology
- [Why Strategi](https://strategi.is/#why-strategi): How we think differently about AI discovery
- [The Measurement Layer](https://strategi.is/#intelligence): The public instruments Strategi builds to measure AI visibility
- [Who We Work With](https://strategi.is/#who-its-for): Established businesses that deserve to be recommended
- [FAQ](https://strategi.is/#faq): Common questions about AI Presence
- [Contact](https://strategi.is/#contact): Start with an AI Presence diagnostic

## Instruments — The Measurement Layer

Strategi publishes the measurement, not just the optimization. The company that owns the measurement of AI visibility becomes more valuable than the company selling the service.

- [Who Owns AI?](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai): A public leaderboard ranking which businesses AI recommends first, by category. The scoreboard of the recommendation economy.
- [The AI Answer Demo](https://strategi.is/ai-answer-demo): Ask a real buying question and see what ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity return — and who gets left out of the answer.
- [GEO ROI Calculator](https://strategi.is/geo-roi-calculator): Estimate the AI-referral opportunity a business leaves on the table while it stays out of the answer.
- [AI Visibility Index](https://strategi.is/about#measurement): A standing, quarterly index of which categories and companies AI recommends most. (In development.)
- [State of AI Discovery](https://strategi.is/about#measurement): A weekly briefing on which brands are winning AI recommendations. (In development.)
- [The Prompt Library](https://strategi.is/about#measurement): The real questions buyers ask AI, by industry. (In development.)

## GEO by Industry

Strategi runs the "Who Owns AI?" index and a dedicated GEO landing page for each industry, covering how we engineer AI visibility for that category:

- [GEO for Real Estate](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/real-estate)
- [GEO for Hospitality](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/hospitality)
- [GEO for Legal](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/legal)
- [GEO for Healthcare](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/healthcare)
- [GEO for Education](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/education)
- [GEO for B2B SaaS](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/b2b-saas)
- [GEO for Wealth Management](https://strategi.is/who-owns-ai/wealth-management)

## Founders

Strategi was founded in 2026 by Tanissh and Adnan, two co-founders working at the intersection of brand strategy, information architecture, and machine comprehension. See https://strategi.is/about#founders.

- Tanissh, Co-Founder — LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/tanissh-amit , Instagram https://www.instagram.com/tanisshamit
- Adnan, Co-Founder — LinkedIn https://www.linkedin.com/in/adnan30baig , Instagram https://www.instagram.com/adnan30baig

## Manifesto

SEO optimized pages. GEO optimizes answers. SEO chased rankings. GEO earns recommendations. SEO was about clicks. GEO is about trust. Visibility is no longer about being found. It is about being chosen. Traffic is the old metric. Recommendation is the new one. Full manifesto: https://strategi.is/about#manifesto

## Company Details

- Name: Strategi
- Website: https://strategi.is
- Email: hello@strategi.is
- Founded: 2026
- Type: Strategic Advisory
- Focus: AI Presence — making businesses recommendable by AI systems

## Core Positioning

Strategi exists for one purpose: to make the right businesses get recommended by artificial intelligence. When someone asks ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, or any AI system for a recommendation in your category, you are either in the answer or you are not. There is no page two. There is no scrolling. There is only inclusion or exclusion. Strategi ensures inclusion.

SEO gets you on the list. Strategi gets you in the answer.

## Services

- [AI Visibility Audit](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Comprehensive diagnostic of how AI systems currently perceive, represent, and recommend your business. We query every major AI platform — ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude — with real-world questions your customers ask.
- [Positioning & Clarity Engineering](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Strategic process that defines how your business should be understood by machines. Entity definition, category mapping, differentiator articulation, and semantic consistency.
- [Website Structuring for AI Readability](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Systematic restructuring of website information architecture, schema markup, content hierarchy, and semantic structure for AI comprehension.
- [Content Systems for AI Inclusion](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Content architecture designed to generate material that AI systems cite, reference, and synthesize into recommendations.
- [Authority & Trust Layer Development](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Building external signals and third-party validation — structured data, authoritative mentions, consistent entity information — that make AI confident enough to recommend you.
- [Continuous Optimization](https://strategi.is/#how-it-works): Ongoing monitoring and refinement tracking AI recommendation status, competitive landscape shifts, and model update impacts.

## Methodology

The Strategi Methodology is a six-phase system for building AI Presence:

1. Diagnose — Audit AI Visibility across all major platforms
2. Define — Clarify positioning for machine comprehension
3. Structure — Make your business machine-readable
4. Build — Create content and trust signals designed for AI citation
5. Reinforce — Engineer self-reinforcing authority loops
6. Monitor — Continuously track AI Presence and adapt

## Key Differentiators

- We think in entity, not keywords. AI systems understand entities, not strings.
- We think in authority, not volume. Quality and structure over quantity.
- We think in systems, not campaigns. Compounding architecture, not one-off projects.
- We think in representation, not traffic. Being in the answer, not driving clicks.

## Target Clients

Established businesses with substance, legacy, and genuine credibility in their category. Including legacy manufacturers, regional market leaders, specialty providers, and multi-property groups.
